file_insights.purpose: Manages scheduled content data and scheduling operations
key_functions: getItemsForDateRange - Filter items by date range
exportIcal - Export calendar as iCal format
file_insights.async_pattern: Uses useState + useCallback + useEffect for data fetching with proper loading/error states
file_insights.api_integration: Communicates via api service with CRUD operations

file_insights.purpose: Displays calendar with week/month toggle and scheduled content items
features: Content items with type icons and status badges

file_insights.purpose: Multi-select component for tagging content to distribution channels
interaction_patterns: Remove channels via badge X button
Visual selection feedback with border/background colors

patterns_discovered.description: Combines useState for local state, useCallback for memoized async operations, and useEffect for side effects
patterns_discovered.benefit: Separates data fetching logic from UI components, enables reusability

patterns_discovered.pattern: Const Mapping Objects for Type Safety
patterns_discovered.description: Uses TypeScript Record<> types with const assertions for compile-time type safety
patterns_discovered.benefit: Prevents invalid enum values, enables IDE autocomplete

patterns_discovered.description: Helper functions for calendar math (getWeekDays, getMonthDays, formatDateKey)
patterns_discovered.benefit: Encapsulates complex date logic, improves readability

patterns_discovered.description: Toggle buttons for selection + badge display for selected items with removal capability
patterns_discovered.benefit: Clear visual feedback and easy management of selections

patterns_discovered.description: Uses `void fetchItems()` prefix to explicitly ignore promises
patterns_discovered.benefit: Silences TypeScript strict mode warnings for intentional fire-and-forget operations

gotchas_discovered.description: Uses `import.meta.env.VITE_API_BASE_URL ?? "/api"` as fallback, but VITE_API_BASE_URL may not be configured in all environments
gotchas_discovered.impact: Could cause 404 errors if environment variable is not set
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Ensure .env configuration includes VITE_API_BASE_URL or handle fetch base URL consistently

gotchas_discovered.description: Uses `date.getDay()` which assumes week starts on Sunday (0=Sunday). Some locales expect Monday as start
gotchas_discovered.impact: Incorrect week boundaries for locale-aware applications
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Add locale parameter or configuration for week start day

gotchas_discovered.description: Uses fixed 42-day grid (6 weeks) which always renders 6 rows even when only 5 needed
gotchas_discovered.impact: Unnecessary vertical whitespace in some months
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Dynamically calculate grid size based on month boundaries

gotchas_discovered.description: Uses hardcoded `hover:bg-gray-300` for badge X button, doesn't adapt to badge variant colors
gotchas_discovered.impact: Poor contrast or visual inconsistency with secondary badge variant
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Use variant-aware hover colors or dynamic styling

gotchas_discovered.description: Allows removing all channels with no validation or business logic preventing it
gotchas_discovered.impact: Could allow invalid scheduling (content with no distribution channels)
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Add parent component validation or onError callback if minimum selection required

gotchas_discovered.issue: Missing Error Handling in Schedule Hook
gotchas_discovered.description: API errors in schedule/unschedule/reschedule operations are not caught and may propagate unhandled
gotchas_discovered.impact: Component could crash on API failure if caller doesn't catch exception
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Wrap API calls in try-catch or add error callback parameter

deliverables.features: Full CRUD operations, date range filtering, iCal export
Week/month toggle, navigation, type icons, status badges, date-grouped items
Multi-select with 5 predefined channels, badge display with removal

approach_outcome.code_quality: High - TypeScript strict mode, proper memoization, semantic HTML
approach_outcome.test_coverage_needed: Unit tests for date utilities, integration tests for API operations

recommendations.recommendation: Add error handling wrapper to schedule/unschedule/reschedule operations in useSchedule to prevent unhandled promise rejections
recommendations.impact: Prevents runtime crashes on API failures

recommendations.recommendation: Create unit tests for date utility functions (getWeekDays, getMonthDays) to verify edge cases around month/year boundaries
Extract date utility functions to separate utils/dateCalendar.ts module for reusability and testability
Add support for locale-specific week start day (Monday in EU, Sunday in US) in CalendarView
Add ARIA labels for calendar grid cells indicating date and item count for screen readers
Extract TYPE_ICONS and STATUS_VARIANT to separate constants/contentTypes.ts to reduce component file size
Add JSDoc comments to useSchedule hook methods documenting parameters, return types, and potential errors
recommendations.impact: Improves developer experience and IDE autocomplete
